---
title: "Language Acquisition"
---

| Slides | Background reading | Primary literature | 
| -- | -- | -- |
| <span class="blue-badge">Language Acquisition ↗</span> | Newport & Getz (2025) | Ferjan Ramirez et al. (2013) <br> Newport et al. (2022) |


::: {.callout-tip appearance=simple}
# Learning Goals

:::
